creator: loader@freebsdmall.com
text:
Hi 4721@hushmail.com,

Would you like to be the maintainer of ports jutils / jinput?
They were created for running Minecraft on FreeBSD (as depends
of games/lwjgl), and now I don't play this game any more. 
I really appreciate it if someone who cares about them could
take over the maintainship.

Thanks,
loader
